About Non-Thesis Master

07
						December

2022

The Non-thesis Master programs are comprised of at least ten courses with a term project course. The students have to submit 2 copies of their project and 2 CDs with assessment form approved by their supervisor to the Institute until 20 January 2023.  Ebru Karageyik (Extension number: 1318)
